emails.subject: Entry Pass - CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run
emails.body:
Dear Suvi,


      Your payment transaction has been verified and registration is APPROVED for CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run.

      Download your Entry Pass PDF inside your Student Portal dashboard.


      Details:

      - Event: CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run

      - Venue: MCA Lab (Hall 3)

      - Timing: 02:00 PM - Oct 12, 2026

      - Entry Pass Code: app_1782885328883_primary


      We look forward to seeing you at Bishop Heber College!

emails.subject: Certificate Unlocked - CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run
emails.body:
Dear Suvi,


      Your attendance pass was successfully verified at the venue door for CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run!

      Your Certificate of Participation has been unlocked and emailed to your team profile.


      Details:

      - Participant: Suvi

      - Event: CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run

      - Validation ID: app_1782885328883_primary


      You can print/download your certificate inside your Student Portal dashboard.


      Best regards,

      Event Organizers, Bishop Heber College

events.title: ByteCraft Hackathon
events.desc: A 24-hour intense software development competition. Form a team and build innovative solutions for real-world problems.
events.rules: Bring your own devices. Projects must be coded from scratch during the event. Use of AI is allowed only for templates. No pre-written codes.

events.title: Ad-Zap Showdown
events.desc: Showcase your marketing and creative skills! Convince the judges by advertising bizarre products on-the-spot.
events.rules: 5 minutes preparation time. 3 minutes presentation. Products assigned randomly. No vulgarity. Judges' decisions are final.

events.title: CodeConquer Debug & Speed Run
events.desc: Speed coding, algorithm design, and reverse engineering. Put your syntax and troubleshooting skills to the test.
events.rules: Individual competition. No internet access allowed. Fastest correct compile wins. Standard libraries only.

events.title: WebCraft UI/UX
events.desc: Design and implement a premium, responsive webpage landing page within 3 hours. Showcase your CSS and layout expertise.
events.rules: Max team size of 2. Raw HTML/CSS/JS only. No Tailwind or React framework. Templates must be designed live.

events.title: MindSprint Tech Quiz
events.desc: General IT, tech history, logic, and trivia. Fast-paced buzzer rounds for computer enthusiasts.
events.rules: Team of 2. Written prelims followed by 6 stage rounds. Buzzer penalties apply for negative points.

events.title: CyberHunt: Cryptic Hunt
events.desc: Solve puzzles, decode ciphers, and scour the campus for clues in this tech-themed treasure hunt.
events.rules: Team of 3. Standard campus rules apply. Solve clues sequentially. Sharing answers results in disqualification.
